feature: Add Product to Cart and Checkout
story: As a product owner I would like the user to be able to select one product, add it to the cart and checkout

cases.title: Add a product to the cart and verify
steps: Navigate to the homepage of NOVA Store
Locate the product named 'Smart LED Desk Lamp'
Click the Add button on the 'Smart LED Desk Lamp' product card
Open the cart drawer by clicking the cart icon
Verify that the cart drawer is visible
Check that the cart contains the 'Smart LED Desk Lamp'
Verify the quantity of the 'Smart LED Desk Lamp' is 1
Verify the price of the 'Smart LED Desk Lamp' is $79.99
assertions: Cart should contain 'Smart LED Desk Lamp'

cases.title: Checkout with Store Pickup
steps: Ensure the cart contains the 'Smart LED Desk Lamp'
Click the Checkout button in the cart drawer
Verify that the checkout page is displayed
Click the Choose Delivery button to proceed to Step 2
Verify that the delivery options are visible
Select the Store Pickup option
Verify that the Store Pickup option is highlighted
Select the store location 'Nova Palo Alto'
Verify that the schedule section is visible
Select the pickup date 'Fri'
Verify that the time selection section is visible
Select the pickup time '10:00 AM'
Click the Continue to Payment button
Verify that the payment details section is visible
Enter the valid card number in the card number field
Enter the cardholder's name in the card name field
Enter the expiry date in the expiry field
Enter the CVV in the CVV field
Click the Review Order button
Verify that the review order section is visible
Click the Place Order button
Verify that the order confirmation page is displayed
Verify that the order confirmation message 'Order Confirmed!' is visible
Verify that the Continue Shopping button is visible
Click the Continue Shopping button
assertions: Store Pickup option should be highlighted
Time selection section should be visible
Payment details section should be visible
Review order section should be visible
Order confirmation page should be displayed
Order confirmation message 'Order Confirmed!' should be visible
Continue Shopping button should be visible
